forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,36 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+depends_on:
+- 01KRRN4P0CN17AWCV2TQAF0NC1
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '8780'
+project: ai-panel
+title: Conversation state from ACP sessionUpdate notifications
+---
+## What
+The ACP `sessionUpdate` notification stream IS the conversation source of truth. Build the store/hook that folds it into renderable message state for the panel UI. No AI SDK `useChat`, no `ChatTransport` â€” the ACP client (previous task) is the transport.
+
+- New `apps/kanban-app/ui/src/ai/conversation.ts` â€” a React hook / store consuming the ACP client's `sessionUpdate` callbacks.
+- Translate each `SessionUpdate` variant into renderable message parts (AI SDK `UIMessage`-shaped, so AI Elements can render them directly):
+  - agent message chunk -> assistant text part (streaming chunks coalesce)
+  - agent thought chunk -> reasoning part
+  - tool call / tool call update -> tool part (name, args, status, result)
+  - plan -> plan/task part
+  - available-commands changed -> available-commands state
+- Track turn status (idle / streaming / error) from prompt start and the `prompt` stop reason.
+- A "new conversation" resets the store and triggers a fresh `newSession` (stateless).
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] Each `SessionUpdate` variant updates the conversation store to the documented `UIMessage` part shape.
+- [ ] Streaming text/thought chunks coalesce into a single growing part.
+- [ ] Turn status reflects streaming vs idle vs error; "new conversation" clears the store.
+- [ ] `npm run build` in `apps/kanban-app/ui` succeeds.
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] Vitest unit tests: feed each `SessionUpdate` variant, assert the resulting message state (one test per variant).
+- [ ] Test chunk coalescing and turn-status transitions.
+- [ ] `npm test` in `apps/kanban-app/ui` is green.
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd` â€” write the per-variant translation tests first.
\ No newline at end of file

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -9,10 +9,12 @@
 title: Conversation state from ACP sessionUpdate notifications
 ---
 ## What
-The ACP `sessionUpdate` notification stream IS the conversation source of truth. Build the store/hook that folds it into renderable message state for the panel UI. No AI SDK `useChat`, no `ChatTransport` â€” the ACP client (previous task) is the transport.
+The ACP `sessionUpdate` notification stream IS the conversation source of truth. Build the React hook that folds it into renderable message state â€” **this hook is what the AI Elements components consume.**

+Do NOT adopt a chat framework (AI SDK `useChat`, TanStack AI). Those exist to talk to LLM providers and manage turns / streaming / tools â€” work the ACP agent and `ClientSideConnection` already do. Routing through one would mean two lossy adapters (ACP -> framework -> UIMessage), an extra (alpha) dependency, and a message model (`useChat` aside, TanStack's `ModelMessage`) that still is not AI Elements' `UIMessage`. Worse, a generic chat hook cannot express ACP's permission *requests*, plans, or session modes. This hook is the single, purpose-built adapter: ACP `SessionUpdate` -> AI-SDK-`UIMessage`-shaped parts that AI Elements renders directly.
+
 - New `apps/kanban-app/ui/src/ai/conversation.ts` â€” a React hook / store consuming the ACP client's `sessionUpdate` callbacks.
-- Translate each `SessionUpdate` variant into renderable message parts (AI SDK `UIMessage`-shaped, so AI Elements can render them directly):
+- Translate each `SessionUpdate` variant into renderable message parts (AI SDK `UIMessage`-shaped, so AI Elements renders them directly):
   - agent message chunk -> assistant text part (streaming chunks coalesce)
   - agent thought chunk -> reasoning part
   - tool call / tool call update -> tool part (name, args, status, result)
@@ -19,12 +21,13 @@
   - plan -> plan/task part
   - available-commands changed -> available-commands state
 - Track turn status (idle / streaming / error) from prompt start and the `prompt` stop reason.
-- A "new conversation" resets the store and triggers a fresh `newSession` (stateless).
+- Expose the hook surface the panel needs: `{ messages, status, sendPrompt, cancel, newConversation, permissionRequest, respondPermission }`. "New conversation" resets the store and triggers a fresh `newSession` (stateless).

 ## Acceptance Criteria
 - [ ] Each `SessionUpdate` variant updates the conversation store to the documented `UIMessage` part shape.
 - [ ] Streaming text/thought chunks coalesce into a single growing part.
 - [ ] Turn status reflects streaming vs idle vs error; "new conversation" clears the store.
+- [ ] The hook exposes `messages` as `UIMessage[]` directly consumable by AI Elements â€” no chat-framework dependency.
 - [ ] `npm run build` in `apps/kanban-app/ui` succeeds.

 ## Tests
